ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead or manager */,
  "project_created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "project_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code change */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the change belongs to */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of code change (e.g., addition, modification, removal) */,
  "code_element" TEXT /* Type of code element (e.g., package, class, method) */,
  "additions" INTEGER /* Number of additions made to the code element */,
  "changes" INTEGER /* Number of changes made to the code element */,
  "removals" INTEGER /* Number of removals made to the code element */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of code elements */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the code change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the code change */,
  "change_status" TEXT /* Current status of the code change */,
  "change_approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the code change */,
  "change_approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the code change was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_changes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code element */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the element belongs to */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of code element (e.g., package, class, method) */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the code element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the code element */,
  "element_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the code element was created */,
  "element_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the code element was last updated */,
  "element_status" TEXT /* Current status of the code element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_elements_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the package belongs to */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the package */,
  "package_version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "package_dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the class belongs to */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the class */,
  "class_version" TEXT /* Version of the class */,
  "class_dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constructors" (
  "constructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constructor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the constructor belongs to */,
  "constructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the constructor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the constructor */,
  "constructor_version" TEXT /* Version of the constructor */,
  "constructor_dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies of the constructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constructors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the method */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the method */,
  "method_dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the field belongs to */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the field */,
  "field_version" TEXT /* Version of the field */,
  "field_dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
